allow: Bash(python -c "import pdfplumber; pdf = pdfplumber.open\('The Multiple Effect Evaporator in The Raw Sugar Factory.pdf'\); [print\(f'--- PAGE {i+1} ---\\n', p.extract_text\(\)\) for i, p in enumerate\(pdf.pages\)]")

Bash(python -c "import pypdf; r = pypdf.PdfReader\('The Multiple Effect Evaporator in The Raw Sugar Factory.pdf'\); [print\(f'--- PAGE {i+1} ---\\n', r.pages[i].extract_text\(\)\) for i in range\(len\(r.pages\)\)]")

Bash(python -c "import PyPDF2; r = PyPDF2.PdfReader\('The Multiple Effect Evaporator in The Raw Sugar Factory.pdf'\); [print\(f'--- PAGE {i+1} ---\\n', r.pages[i].extract_text\(\)\) for i in range\(len\(r.pages\)\)]")
